Wedding Film NY, led by award-winning cinematographer Uladzimir Taukachou, provides wedding videography across New York, Long Island, Westchester, Connecticut, and New Jersey. They offer cinematic wedding films along with aerial drone videography, same-day edits, and 360 VR videography for a truly immersive experience.
